zh.title: 默主哥耶预言全集 - 圣母玛利亚给六位神视者的十大秘密与讯息 | Medjugorje Prophecies
zh.description: 波斯尼亚默主哥耶圣母显现（1981年至今），六位神视者声称接受圣母玛利亚的讯息与十大秘密。涵盖和平、祈祷、斋戒、皈依等核心主题。2024年梵蒂冈批准相关灵修活动。
zh.keywords: 默主哥耶,圣母显现,十大秘密,Medjugorje,预言,和平女王,圣母玛利亚,神视者,梵蒂冈批准
zh.ogTitle: 默主哥耶预言全集 | Medjugorje Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 波斯尼亚默主哥耶圣母显现的十大秘密与核心讯息完整收录，六位神视者的预言与验证分析。
zh.twitterDescription: 默主哥耶圣母显现：六位神视者接受的十大秘密与和平讯息，含验证分析。2024年梵蒂冈批准灵修活动。

en.title: Medjugorje Prophecies - The 10 Secrets & Messages from Our Lady (1981-present) | Full Archive
en.description: The Marian apparitions at Medjugorje, Bosnia (since 1981). Six visionaries report messages and 10 secrets from the Virgin Mary. Core themes: peace, prayer, fasting, conversion, faith. Vatican nihil obstat granted in 2024.
en.keywords: Medjugorje,Medjugorje secrets,Our Lady of Medjugorje,Queen of Peace,Marian apparitions,visionaries,prophecy,Vatican approval,Bosnia
en.ogTitle: Medjugorje Prophecies - The 10 Secrets & Messages from Our Lady
en.ogDescription: Complete archive of the Medjugorje apparitions: 10 secrets, monthly messages, and core teachings from the Queen of Peace, with verification analysis.
en.twitterDescription: Medjugorje: 10 secrets and messages from Our Lady to six visionaries since 1981. Vatican approved devotion in 2024.
